body.title: CLOSED: DRM-failed books sentinel + BOOK_DRM_BLOCKED memory
body.result: DRM_FAILED sentinel in ebook_reader; _handle_drm_blocked in book_learner marks failed + files BOOK_DRM_BLOCKED memory
body.description:
Pass-2 area_6 finding: DRM-failure paths silently produce completion records. Return a DRM_FAILED sentinel from ebook_reader on decrypt failure; book_learner recognizes the sentinel and marks the item 'failed' in reading_list, skips memory deposit, files BOOK_DRM_BLOCKED_* FACTUAL memory instead.

**Affected files:** wild_igor/igor/tools/ebook_reader.py, lab/claudecode/book_learner.py, wild_igor/igor/tools/reading_engine.py
**Design rules:** no-sqlite
**Scope boundary:** IN — sentinel return value, failed status write, BOOK_DRM_BLOCKED memory. OUT — implementing DRM removal.
**Test plan:** test_book_learner.py: inject DRM_FAILED sentinel; assert reading_list item status='failed', no deposit call, one BOOK_DRM_BLOCKED memory written.
**Pass condition:** DRM failure path writes exactly one BOOK_DRM_BLOCKED memory and zero cortex deposits in the test.
